variants.name: 弗洛斯蒂
variants.ability: 每个夜晚，首个使用自身能力选择了你的邪恶玩家会醉酒直到下个黄昏，即使你已死亡，然后你会得知该玩家的角色并死亡。
variants.firstNightReminder: If Frosty died tonight, wake them and show them the token of the first evil character that selected them
variants.otherNightReminder: If Frosty died tonight, wake them and show them the token of the first evil character that selected them
variants.flavor: In a whirl of glistening snow, Frosty dances with joy aglow, bringing laughter wherever he goes, as his magic hat bestows
